title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Extension System Mission
summary: A shared AI enablement team. The team needs one production workflow installed, tested, and operated in both Codex and Claude. Planned artifact: Deliver Cross-Client Skill and MCP Capstone with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Track stable MCP specifications and test release-candidate migrations behind explicit compatibility gates.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-integration-defense-n3pbdp: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Integration Defense into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-integration-defense-n3pbdp:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The structural check is only one gate. The following changed-case decision and explanation must also hold.

stimulus.title: Integration Defense failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: A technically working demo is a complete extension product.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

options.text: Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Integration Defense condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Integration Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.
